strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript/Node.js, React, and multiple languages
Current role includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, matching AI agent requirement
Strong testing/TDD background including authoring test frameworks and running workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Limited explicit cloud platform breadth (AWS noted, GCP/Azure absent) and no Kubernetes hands-on depth detailed
Kotlin experience not mentioned; Java exposure appears dated
response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with well over the required 6 years, strong TypeScript/Node.js/React fundamentals, a clear testing-first mindset, and directly relevant current work on AI agents and MCP tooling. Gaps exist around the specific Nest.js framework and Kotlin secondary stack, and cloud/Kubernetes depth is only partially evidenced, but the overall profile aligns well with the role's fullstack and AI-agent focus.
